title: aster × bolanderi
intro: Aster × bolanderi, also known as Bolander's aster or Bolander's false aster, is a rare hybrid plant of the genus Aster, native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Aster × bolanderi include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations, wounds, and infections.
